constraints.layout_style: table rows with inputs in td cells

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span

reference_templates.title: Deep wrapped label
reference_templates.notes: Label without for wraps input three div levels deep
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Deep wrapped label

reference_templates.title: Number min max experience
reference_templates.notes: Years of experience number input with min/max constraints
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Number constraints

reference_templates.title: Duplicate element IDs
reference_templates.notes: Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate element IDs

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Reference DOM (Deep wrapped label): Label without for wraps input three div levels deep Reference DOM (Number min max experience): Years of experience number input with min/max constraints Reference DOM (Duplicate element IDs): Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: shadow-host, table-layout, details-accordion, glued-label-text, aria-labelledby-hidden. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: table rows with inputs in td cells. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Deep wrapped label; Number min max experience; Duplicate element IDs.
